title: callotropis tricolor
intro: Callotropis tricolor, also known as the butterfly jasmine, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Callotropis tricolor include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit potential antiviral and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Callotropis tricolor can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
